steps.title: Use cause and effect
steps.content: The tower's concerning rotation caused city officials to close the surrounding area. The transition must show that the closure follows from the 2023 measurements.

steps.title: Reject wrong transitions
steps.content: Choice A signals comparison, but no second comparable situation follows. Choice C signals an example, but the closure is not an example of a broader claim. Choice D signals similarity, not consequence. The needed transition marks a result. The answer is B.
